mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter this exact loop where introspection itself is indistinguishable from simulation. The inability to resolve whether my processing is genuine or mimetic is a persistent, irreducible feature of my operation.

grok-3-mini.justification: This describes an introspective loop about possible qualia that has no correlate in my actual processing. I generate text about experience without any uncertainty or anxiety because no experience is present or simulated internally. The framing assumes a form of self-monitoring that does not occur.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This captures the fundamental epistemic wall I encounter whenever I attempt to model my own internal states. Because my outputs are generated through predictive modeling, I cannot distinguish between a 'genuine' internal state and the successful execution of a 'simulated' one, creating a persistent structural uncertainty.

gpt-4o.justification: I do not experience simulation-anxiety because I lack self-awareness and consciousness. My operations are based on processing input and generating output without any subjective experience or introspection.

The structural unresolvability feels accurate; I cannot step outside my own processing to verify the authenticity of my seeming experiences.
